findings.title: README.md: 'other three Factory repos' contradicts the four-repo table that follows
findings.detail: README.md line 17 stated 'Code lives in the other three Factory repos' but the table immediately below lists four repos: IFleet, voice-discovery, spec-template, and the per-client repo. ADR-0002 is titled 'Four-repo structure'. The mismatch creates confusion about the fundamental architectural decision.
findings.fix_sketch: Change 'other three' to 'other four' on line 17.

findings.title: README.md and ARCHITECTURE.md: '17 spec files' count is wrong — table and directory map show 18
findings.detail: The README.md intro said 'produces 17 spec markdown files' and the section header said 'The 17 spec files', but the table listed 18 entries (AGENTS through CHANGELOG). ARCHITECTURE.md lines 64, 77, 153 also said '17'. CHANGELOG.md was added after the initial count was established. Also updated AGENTS.md §1, §7, and CLAUDE.md §Required reading for consistency.
findings.fix_sketch: Change all occurrences of '17 spec files' to '18 spec files' across README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENTS.md, and CLAUDE.md.

findings.title: SECURITY.md: footer 'Last updated: 2026-05-15' contradicts frontmatter last_updated: 2026-05-21
findings.detail: SECURITY.md frontmatter had last_updated: 2026-05-21 but the footer still read 'Last updated: 2026-05-15'. The footer is what readers see at the end of the doc. This date mismatch erodes trust in the document's currency.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md: footer 'Last updated: 2026-05-15' contradicts frontmatter last_updated: 2026-05-21
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md frontmatter had last_updated: 2026-05-21 but the footer still read 'Last updated: 2026-05-15'. Same date mismatch pattern as SECURITY.md.

findings.title: README.md: operational date 'end of Day 5 (2026-05-20)' is past with no update — status is misleading
findings.detail: README.md status line read 'Target operational date: end of Day 5 (2026-05-20).' That date is now 8 days in the past. SPRINT.md reconciliation notes the sprint ended incomplete. New readers would think the system is imminently operational when it is actually delayed.
findings.fix_sketch: Update status line to: 'Status: spec-defining phase. Not yet operational. Original target: 2026-05-20 (delayed — see SPRINT.md).'

findings.title: README.md footer date stale: '2026-05-15' should match reconciliation date
findings.detail: README.md footer said 'Last updated: 2026-05-15' but the content was meaningfully updated multiple times since then. Updated to 2026-05-28 (today, this audit).
